title: 解けないものは、解けないままでいい

text_block_list.text:
I remember, a long time ago, a friend and I used
to play pretend cafe. My friend played the cafe's
barista. Whereas, I...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I meander aimlessly, stuck trying to put
something together for the next training regimen,
when...

text_block_list.name: Cafe Barista
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, you look rather lost in thought. How about
a cup of coffee at my cafe? I've just opened up.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a look at the cafe before me. There's
something about the rustic exterior that draws me
in...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Welcome. I think... you will be our last
customer.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...I'll pour you... a cup of coffee.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Here you are.
choice_data_list: Ooh, latte art of a cat.
Ooh, latte art of a cat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The execution is perfect. My attention is drawn to
its charming expression. And... into the center of
its round eyes...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I... become sucked in...
HEY, wake up already!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You're conscious... Your eyes look fine.
Everything's normal. Just as I thought. We got
here right before the nosedive.
choice_data_list: Wh-what do you think you're doing?
Wh-what do you think you're doing?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
We're investigating the "illogical" cafe! Shakur
couldn't get it off her mind. This place is
wonderful, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Cafe, there's no foolin' me. I know this is all your
doing.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: The trigger is the coffee, right?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The latte art serves as a visual distraction as you
alter our state of consciousness. In other words,
it's hypnosis.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But what I can't figure out is... how you
hypnotized us before serving the latte art.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah. Doesn't make sense no matter how you
slice it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You were drawn to this cafe the moment you saw
it, right? The same thing happened to us, and
everyone else who's visited this place.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
So, you walk inside and who's behind the bar?
None other than Cafe. Were you surprised?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Right. One look from the outside and I did a feel
a strong pull inviting me in. But I didn't find it
strange that Manhattan Cafe was inside.
choice_data_list: Now that I think of it, it does all seem bizarre...
Now that I think of it, it does all seem bizarre...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
My suspicions brought me back here. And just as I
arrived, there you were moseying your way inside.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The question is... what is it that altered your
consciousness from the start?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Cafe. It's time to come clean. What did you do?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...This cafe appears... to those who seek it. I
only... pour this coffee... with passion.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...I don't understand it... myself. But I don't... need
to. This is fine... the way it is.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...I suppose... it's about time to finish up,
however.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe lifts the coffee mug in her hand
and...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Y-y-you shouldn't do that, Cafe! Coffee mugs
aren't meant to be—Hwah! Th-the sun!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It was nice... getting to play pretend cafe after all
this time. But now... playtime is over. Thank you...
for acting as one of the staff.

text_block_list.name: Black Cat
text_block_list.text: Meow.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...No, it's enough for now. I'm all out of coffee
beans.

text_block_list.name: Black Cat
text_block_list.text: Meooow.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Sure. We can do this again once I get a hold of
some new beans. I enjoyed myself. It brought
back memories.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Someday... I want to brew a delicious, comforting
cup of coffee. Just like my father... did for his
customers.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but next time... don't bring in any customers
by force.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I know that you approached everyone. First you
were a child, then a fishmonger...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: H-huh? I don't remember coming here...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh... oh! That's right!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Cafe was helping out at a cafe, so we dropped by
to taste her brew!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... That's right. And the coffee wasn't half
bad.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Hey, it's nearly curfew. I'll catch you around.
Not in the mood to hear an earful for being late.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ah, Shakur! W-wait for meee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I still feel lightheaded. And actually... I have a
strange feeling that maybe, someone's watching
me.
choice_data_list: I must be imagining things. I better head back...
I must be imagining things. I better head back...

text_block_list.text:
...I'm looking forward to your next visit. I will have
a special brew ready... just for you.

As I watch the three of them return to the
academy, I whisper the words that remind me of
her.

text_block_list.name: Black Cat
text_block_list.text: And scratch my ear with my hind leg.
